ProductId.description: The sellable product for which the entitlements are granted. This field is a relationship field.

UsageResourceId.description: Usage Resource ID

ConditionNumber.description: Required. A unique number that’s assigned to a condition in a sequence policy.

FilterField.description: Required. The field used in the filter condition.

FilterFieldType.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
FilterFieldType.description: The data type of the filter field. Valid values are: • Boolean • Currency • Date • DateTime • MultiPicklist • Number • Percent • Picklist • Reference

FilterValue.description: Required. The value in the filter condition.

LastReferencedDate.description: The timestamp when the current user last accessed a sequence policy selection condition record indirectly, for example, through a list view or related record.

LastViewedDate.description: The timestamp when the current user last viewed a sequence policy selection condition record. If this value is null, it’s possible that the user only accessed the sequence policy selection condition record or a related list view (LastReferencedDate), but not viewed the sequence policy selection condition record itself.

Operator.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
Operator.description: Required. The relational operator used to compare the filter field with the filter value. Valid values are: • Equals

SequencePolicyId.description: Required. The parent sequence policy associated with the sequence policy selection condition. Deleting a sequencing policy automatically removes all its associated criteria. This field is a relationship field.

SequencePolicySelectionConditionName.properties: Autonumber, Defaulted on create, Filter, idLookup, Sort
SequencePolicySelectionConditionName.description: Required. The name of the sequence policy selection condition. SequenceGapReconciliation Represents a missing sequence value identified during reconciliation, which can be used later to ensure there are no gaps in the sequence policy numbers. This object is available in API version 65.0 and later. Supported Calls describeLayout(), describeSObjects(), getDeleted(), getUpdated(), query(), retrieve(), search() Special Access Rules You need the Billing Admin permission set to access this object.

OwnerId.properties: Filter, Group, Sort
OwnerId.description: Required. The ID of the user who owns a sequence gap reconciliation record. This field is a polymorphic relationship field.

SequenceGapReconciliationNumber.properties: Autonumber, Defaulted on create, Filter, idLookup, Sort
SequenceGapReconciliationNumber.description: Required. The reconciled sequence pattern value.

BillDayOfMonth.description: The day of the month on which a recurring billing process is scheduled to occur.

BilledAmount.description: The total amount (excluding tax) that has been invoiced from the billing schedule. This field is a calculated field.

BillingAccountId.description: Required. The ID of the account that's related to the billing schedule. This field is a relationship field.

BillingMethod.properties: Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort
BillingMethod.description: The type of billing used for the source item. Valid values are: • Evergreen • OrderAmount • Usage—Available in API version 63.0 and later with Revenue Cloud Billing license.

BillingMilestonePlanId.description: The billing milestone plan associated with the billing schedule. This field is available in API version 63.0 and later with Revenue Cloud Billing license. This field is a relationship field.

BillingPeriodAmount.description: The amount to be invoiced each billing period. For example, if the billing period is monthly, this field shows the monthly amount that appears on the invoice line.

BillingScheduleEndDate.description: The last date that the billing schedule is available for invoicing. This value is inherited from the EndDate field on the order item.

BillingScheduleGroupId.description: Required. The billing schedule group that contains the billing schedule. Billing schedules are grouped when they have the same source order item. The source order item is the original order item that a customer bought. Afterwards, if the customer amends, cancels, or renews the order item, a new billing schedule is created with the BillingScheduleGroupId for the original order item. This field is a relationship field.

BillingScheduleNumber.properties: Autonumber, Defaulted on create, Filter, idLookup, Sort
BillingScheduleNumber.description: Required. The auto-generated reference number for the billing schedule.

BillingScheduleStartDate.description: The date when the billing schedule is available for invoicing. This value is inherited from the ServiceDate field on the order item.

BillingTerm.description: The duration for which the customer is invoiced.

BillingTermUnit.description: Required. The unit of measurement of the billing term. Valid values are: • BillingMilestonePlan—Available in API version 63.0 and later with Revenue Cloud Billing license. • Day • Month • OneTime • Quarter • Semi-Annual

BillingTreatmentItemId.description: The billing treatment item that's used to configure invoiceable amounts on the billing schedule. This field is a relationship field.

BillingType.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
BillingType.description: The timing of invoicing for a product or service relative to its delivery to the customer. Valid values are: • Advance— Invoices a product or service before its delivery. • Arrears — Invoices a product or service after its delivery.

CancellationDate.description: The date from when the user can no longer access the service. For example, if a service ends on August 31, the cancellation date is September 1 because that’s the date from when the user can no longer use the service. Billing schedules past their cancellation date aren't invoiced.

Category.description: Required. The category of the billing schedule. Valid values are: • AmendQuantity— A billing schedule for an order that changes the quantity. • Cancellation — A billing schedule for an order that was canceled. • Original — A billing schedule for the initial order. • Renewal — A billing schedule for an order that was renewed.

CustomInvoiceGroupKey.description: The group identifier for which an invoice must be generated when the invoice group type is Custom. This field is available in API version 63.0 and later with Revenue Cloud Billing license.

InvBatchDraftToPostedRunId.description: The batch job that posts all invoices with a status as Draft that are generated by the invoice batch run associated with the billing schedule. This field is a relationship field.

InvoiceBatchRunId.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Update
InvoiceBatchRunId.description: The invoice batch run that evaluated the billing schedule and its billing period items to generate an invoice. This field is a relationship field.

InvoiceGroupType.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
InvoiceGroupType.description: Specifies whether to generate an invoice for a billing schedule, a custom group, or the default group of account, bill-to-contact, payment term, currency, and tax engine. Valid values are: • Billing Schedule • Custom • Default This field is available in API version 63.0 and later with Revenue Cloud Billing license.

InvoiceRunMatchingValue.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
InvoiceRunMatchingValue.description: The batch value used by the invoice run that evaluated the billing schedule. During an invoice run, billing schedules with the same batch value, including null, are grouped to the same invoice run.

LineAmount.description: The amount associated with a specific line item in the billing schedule. Available in API version 63.0 and later.

NetUnitPrice.description: The net unit price of the order item for which the billing schedule was created. Available in API version 64.0 and later.

NextBillingDate.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Update
NextBillingDate.description: The date that the next billing period starts for the invoice. This date is used to calculate which invoice lines are included on an invoice. When an invoice scheduler or API evaluates an order for invoicing, billing schedules with a next billing date on or before the invoice's target date are included in the invoice.

NextChargeFromDate.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Update
NextChargeFromDate.description: The date that the billing schedule is invoiced in the upcoming billing period. For example, if you invoiced a customer for a billing period of 01/01/24 through 01/31/24, the billing schedule's NextChargeFromDate is 02/01/22.

OriginalBillingScheduleId.description: If the billing schedule is an amended or canceled billing schedule, then this field shows the original billing schedule. Otherwise, this field is null. This field is a relationship field.

PendingAmount.description: The amount from the current billing term that hasn't been billed yet. For example, the unbilled amount for a month, quarter, or year, depending on this billing schedule's billing term.

PricingTermUnit.description: Required. The unit of time for which the pricing of the product applies. Valid values are: • Months • Quarterly • Semi-Annual • Annual Available in API version 66.0 and later.

Quantity.description: The quantity of the order item that created the billing schedule.

Reference.description: The ID of the parent record of the reference item for which the billing schedule is created. Available in API version 61.0 and later.

ReferenceEntityId.description: The parent order of the order item that created the billing schedule. This field is a polymorphic relationship field.

ReferenceEntityItemId.description: The order item or asset that created the billing schedule. This field is a polymorphic relationship field.

ReferenceItem.description: The ID of the transaction line item record for which the billing schedule is created. Available in API version 61.0 and later.

Status.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
Status.description: Required. The status of the order item that the billing schedule represents. Valid values are: • WaitingForMilestoneEventAccomplishment—Available in API version 63.0 and later with Revenue Cloud Billing license. • CompletelyBilled • Error • Processing

TaxTreatmentId.description: Required. The ID of the treatment that's used to calculate tax for the billing schedule. This value is defined based on the order item's tax policy. This field is a relationship field.

TotalAmount.description: The type of the billing schedule. Valid values are: • LineItemAdjustedCharge • LineItemAdjustment

UsageResourceId.description: Usage Resource ID

BilledThroughPeriod.description: Last billing period that includes this date

CurrencyIsoCode.properties: Create, Defaulted on create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
CurrencyIsoCode.description: Available only if the multicurrency feature is enabled. Contains the ISO code for any currency allowed by the organization.

EffectiveFrom.description: The date and time when the pricing procedure resolution comes into effect.

EffectiveTo.description: The date and time till when the pricing procedure resolution remains effective.

LastReferencedDate.description: Indicates whether the pricing procedure resolution has been archived (true) or not (false). This field is read-only.

LastViewedDate.description: The timestamp for when the current user last viewed this record. If this value is null, it’s possible that this record was referenced (LastReferencedDate) and not viewed.

Name.properties: Autonumber, Defaulted on create, Filter, idLookup, Sort
Name.description: Required. The name of the pricing procedure resolution.

PricingProcedureId.description: The pricing procedure record associated with this pricing procedure resolution.

ProcedureType.description: The pricing data store associated with this pricing recipe field mappings.

CommitmentAssetId.description: The asset ID associated with the Usage Ratable Summary. This field is a relationship field.

ErrorCode.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
ErrorCode.description: Specifies the unique code generated when an error occurs. Valid value is INTERNAL_ERROR.

ErrorDescription.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Update
ErrorDescription.description: Specifies the description of the error that occurred.

LastReferencedDate.description: The date when this record was last referenced.

UsageResourceId.description: The usage resource associated with the usage entitlement bucket. This field is a relationship field.

Name.description: Name

LastReferencedDate.description: The most recent date when a user referenced this record.

LastViewedDate.description: The most recent date when a user viewed this record.

ActualTax.description: The region-specific tax amount determined at time of the order. This field is not used for price and tax calculations.

AdjustmentAmount.description: An adjustment to the product amount, such as a discount.

AssetActionId.description: The related asset action, that is, the change caused by an asset action source transaction. This field is a relationship field.

AssetActionSourceNumber.properties: Autonumber, Defaulted on create, Filter, idLookup, Sort
AssetActionSourceNumber.description: The ID of the asset action source. Label is Name.

BillingReference.properties: Createable, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Updateable
BillingReference.description: The discount, expressed as a percentage, that's applied to the asset. This field is available in API version 62.0 and later.

DiscountAmount.description: The discount, expressed as currency, that's applied to the asset. This field is available in API version 62.0 and later.

EffectiveGrantDate.description: The date when the resources associated with the asset were granted. This field is available in orgs that have Revenue Cloud when Rate Management is enabled. This field is available in API version 62.0 and later.

EndDate.properties: Createable, Filter, Nillable, Sort, Updateable
EndDate.description: The end date of the service or change.

EstimatedTax.description: The estimate of the region-specific tax amount made at time of the transaction.

ExternalReference.properties: Createable, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Updateable
ExternalReference.description: The ID of an asset action source transaction originating in a system outside of Salesforce.

ExternalReferenceDataSource.properties: Createable, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Updateable
ExternalReferenceDataSource.description: A system outside of Salesforce that contains asset action source transactions.

LegalEntityId.properties: Createable, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Updateable
LegalEntityId.description: The ID of the legal entity record associated with the asset action source transaction. This field is a relationship field. This field is available in API version 62.0 and later.

ListPrice.description: List price for the order product. Value is inherited from the associated PriceBookEntry upon order product creation.

NetUnitPrice.description: The final adjusted unit price, inclusive of all adjustments, but exclusive of tax. The unit price after all price adjustments are applied.

ObligatedAmount.description: When a line amount is prorated, this amount shows the service amount that’s been consumed.

OriginalLineNumber.properties: Createable, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Updateable
OriginalLineNumber.description: The number of the original order item detail line. Salesforce uses this information to create a record to amend, renew, or cancel an order. This field is available in API version 64.0 and later.

PeriodBoundary.description: Boundary delimiters for periods. It determines when a period starts and/or ends. Valid values are: • AlignToCalendar • Anniversary • DayOfPeriod

PeriodBoundaryDay.description: The number specifying the day number when Period Boundary is a specific day in a week/month/year. It only applies when PeriodBoundary is set to "day of period.”

PeriodBoundaryStartMonth.description: Field is populated based on input in the StartDate, PeriodBoundary, and PeriodBoundaryDay when BillingFrequency2 is Annual or by manual user entry. Possible values are: 1-January 2-February 3-March 4-April 5-May 6-June 7-July 8-August 9-September 10-October 11-November 12-December

PricebookEntryId.properties: Createable, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Updateable
PricebookEntryId.description: PricebookEntry is used as a lookup for price information in order to pre-populate OrderItem's ListPrice and UnitPrice.

PricingTermCount.description: Number of pricing terms is this subscription product.

ProductAmount.description: The product amount after the asset action source transaction.

ProductSellingModelId.properties: Creatable, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Updateable
ProductSellingModelId.description: Specifies the product selling model type. Foreignkey to ProductSellingModel entity.

ProrationPolicyId.properties: Creatable, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Updateable
ProrationPolicyId.description: The ID of the ProrationPolicy used for pricing.

Quantity.description: The product quantity or the change in product quantity after the asset action source transaction.

ReferenceEntityItemId.properties: Createable, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Updateable
ReferenceEntityItemId.description: The ID of an asset action source transaction originating in Salesforce. The transaction can be an order product or a work order line item. This field is a polymorphic relationship field.

SegmentIdentifier.description: The ID of the ramp segment associated with the asset action source transaction. This field is available in API version 62.0 and later.

StartDate.description: The start date of the service or change.

Subtotal.description: The sum of the product amount and the adjustment amount. This field is a calculated field.

TaxTreatmentId.properties: Createable, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Updateable
TaxTreatmentId.description: Lookup to Tax Treatment entity. It's used to calculate tax.

TotalLineAmount.description: The price of the line before any price adjustments were applied. SalesTransactionItem: ProratedStartingTotal / StartingPriceTotal. Note: TotalPrice is computed using the UnitPrice, which includes discounts (price adjustments), while TotalLineAmount doesn’t include price adjustments.

DataType.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Restricted picklist, Sort
DataType.description: The data type of the attribute definition. Valid values are: • Checkbox • Currency—Available in API version 61.0 and later • Date • Datetime • Number • Percent—Available in API version 61.0 and later • Picklist • Text

CanRamp.description: Indicates whether the product’s terms, volumes, and other commitments can be ramped (true) at run time or not (false) The default value is false.
CanRamp.properties: Defaulted on create, Filter, Group, Sort

DecompositionScope.description: The number of fulfillment order line items that must be generated. Available in API version 61.0 and later. Valid values are: • Account • Bundle • Order
DecompositionScope.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update

FulfillmentQtyCalcMethod.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
FulfillmentQtyCalcMethod.description: Determines whether the quantity of fulfillment order line items must always be one or must be aggregated from the source line items. Available in API version 61.0 and later.

UsageModelType.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
UsageModelType.description: The type of usage model for a product or service. Anchor is the main subscription product or service. Pack is the add-on product or service that grants additional usage resources for consumption. Available in API version 62.0 and later. Valid values are: • Anchor • Pack

Code.properties: Create, Filter, Group, idLookup, Nillable, Sort, Update
Code.description: A unique ID associated with the catalog. The maximum size is 80 alphanumeric characters.

EffectiveEndDate.description: The date after which the product catalog is unavailable to end users.

EffectiveStartDate.description: The date on which the product catalog is available to end users.

CatalogType.properties: Create, Defaulted on create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
CatalogType.description: The category of an entry in the catalog. Possible values are: • Sales • ServiceProcess—Service Process The default value is Sales.

IsNavigational.properties: Create, Defaulted on create, Filter, Group, Sort, Update
IsNavigational.description: Indicates whether the category or subcategory is shown in the menu as a navigational breadcrumb (true) or not (false). Available in API version 62.0 and later. The default value is false.

ParentGroupId.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Update
ParentGroupId.description: The parent product component group in a nested group hierarchy for the same parent product. Available in API version 62.0 and later. This field is a relationship field.

ChildProductClassificationId.description: The child product classification that's associated with a product. This field is a relationship field.

QuoteVisibility.properties: Create, Defaulted on create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
QuoteVisibility.description: Specifies the product-related component to display as a quote line item in the Transaction Line Editor and the quote document. The default value is Always. Possible values are: • Always • Transaction Line Editor Only • Quote Document Only

AssociatedProductRoleCat.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Restricted picklist, Sort
AssociatedProductRoleCat.description: The role that the associated component plays in the relationship. Valid values are: • BundleComponent— The associated product is part of a bundle. • ClassificationComponent— The associated component is a product classification. Available in API version 61.0 and later

IsDefault.properties: Create, Defaulted on create, Filter, Group, Sort, Update

ConfigurationRuleDefinition.description: The description of the configuration rule.

ProductId.description: The product associated with the Product Configuration Flow. This field is a relationship field.

EffectiveFromDate.description: The date and time from which the configuration rules comes into effect.

EffectiveToDate.description: The date and time to which the configuration rules ceases to be in effect.

LastReferencedDate.description: The date the configuration rule record was last referenced.

LastViewedDate.description: The date the configuration rule record was last viewed.

Name.description: The name of the configuration rule.

OwnerId.properties: Create, Defaulted on create, Filter, Group, Sort, Update
OwnerId.description: The ID of the configuraion rule owner. This field is a polymorphic relationship field.

ProcessScope.properties: Create, Defaulted on create, Filter, Group, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
ProcessScope.description: The scope of the configuration rule. Possible values are: • Bundle • Product The default value is Product.

RuleSubType.properties: Create, Defaulted on create, Filter, Group, Restricted picklist, Sort, Update
RuleSubType.description: The segregation of products into subsets such that the configuration rules only apply to the products that fall under the ambit of the selected rule subtype. Possible values are: • BundleProduct • BundleProductClassification • Product • ProductClassification

DateOffset.description: The user-entered description for the payment schedule treatment detail.
